untranslatable_reason: This signal requires stock-level beta calculation and cross-sectional portfolio construction (sorting by beta, leverage/de-leverage ratios, beta-neutral hedging) which cannot be expressed using single-instrument technical indicators. Beta is a multi-asset statistical measure requiring historical returns correlation to a benchmark, not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires dynamic portfolio rebalancing logic and leverage mechanics that fall outside point-in-time entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2049939_10 is a factor-based systematic strategy requiring: (1) beta estimation across a stock universe, (2) leverage/de-leverage position sizing, (3) correlation-based portfolio construction. These require portfolio-level calculations and cross-sectional data unavailable to single-asset technical analysis. Recommend implementing as a portfolio-level factor overlay rather than individual trade rules.
